retry_reason: Not a refcount wrapper, so retry logic is irrelevant.

judge.reason: The primary purpose of __dw_mipi_dsi2_probe is hardware initialization and device registration, not reference-count management. It allocates a DRM bridge, sets up clocks, resets, regmap, and registers a MIPI DSI host. The only refcount operation (via devm_reset_control_get_optional_exclusive) is an internal detail of the reset framework and not exposed to callers. The function returns a newly allocated dsi2 object, but does not provide any get/put/set semantics for a reference-counted object.
judge.retry_reason: Not a refcount wrapper, so retry logic is irrelevant.

final.retry_reason: Not a refcount wrapper, so retry logic is irrelevant.
